query: Copilot in Excel new feature prevent unwanted edits shared workbooks prepare changes

{"query":"Copilot in Excel new feature prevent unwanted edits shared workbooks prepare changes","model":"mako","response_time_ms":2270,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/microsoft365copilotblog/what%E2%80%99s-new-in-microsoft-365-copilot--june-2026/4529572","title":"What’s New in Microsoft 365 Copilot | June 2026 | Microsoft Community Hub","content":"New plugins available in the plugin store include Enosix, Harvey, LSEG, Miro, monday.com, Moodys, Morningstar, S&P Global Energy, and TeamsMaestro, with Databricks available through sideloading.
It's a fast way to get back up to speed on shared and evolving files.
Copilot in Excel now supports Personalization, so users can set standing preferences once and have Copilot apply them consistently across workbooks."},{"url":"https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/copilot/release-notes","title":"Release Notes for Microsoft 365 Copilot | Microsoft Learn","content":"Why: This change simplifies brand kit creation by automating the extraction of brand elements from guidelines, saving time and ensuring consistency.
Save and publish changes to update the ESS Agent landing page.
What changed: Previously, clicking on cited content in Copilot opened files in a new browser tab outside of Copilot.
What changed: A new Copilot connector enables integration with 15Five.
Use explanations to prepare speaker notes or refine slide content.
Use GPT‑5.5 Instant to check formulas or explain a STEM concept.
Edit with Copilot in Excel to build and change workbooks, using Excel tools like tables, charts, PivotTables, and formulas to complete complex data tasks faster.
Personal impact: Makes task reviews and updates more efficient.","date":"3 days ago"},{"url":"https://windowsforum.com/threads/excel-april-2026-update-copilot-moves-from-chat-to-editing-with-python.415767/","title":"Excel April 2026 Update: Copilot Moves From Chat to Editing, With Python | Windows Forum","content":"“Allow editing” moves Copilot into the workbook itself, where it can create content, apply formatting, build formulas, and make native Excel changes.
If a user asks Excel to “make a dashboard based on this data,” the assistant should not immediately begin throwing charts, PivotTables, conditional formatting, and generated formulas into the file.
This is not new for Microsoft 365, but AI makes it more visible.
The feature is user-facing, but the rollout is organizational.
Excel’s April 2026 update is therefore less about the number of new features than about the direction of authority."},{"url":"https://www.flotek.io/blog/microsoft-365-copilot-updates-april-2026","title":"Microsoft 365 Copilot Updates | April 2026 | Flotek Group","content":"For the wider Teams picture, see our Microsoft Teams updates for April 2026.
Copilot can now make multi-step edits to Excel workbooks stored locally on Windows and Mac — no more need to move files into the cloud first to get Copilot involved.
Build sites, libraries and pages in plain English — plus Copilot can now edit Excel files stored locally on your device."},{"url":"https://activedirectorypro.com/microsoft-365-upcoming-changes-new-features/","title":"Microsoft 365 Upcoming Changes & New Features - Active Directory Pro","content":"This update is part of the SharePoint visual refresh and applies our new design language across the SharePoint page editing surfaces, helping create…
New Outlook for Windows will extend S/MIME support to shared mailboxes and delegate mailboxes associated with a user's primary account.
Microsoft Purview network data security now integrates with Palo Alto Prisma Access, extending discovery and protection to network traffic.
Users can participate naturally in multilingual conversations while the device interprets spoken audio, reducing language barriers and supporting clearer communication in everyday calling scenarios.
Microsoft 365Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)
To give users more visibility…"}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Copilot in Excel new feature prevent unwanted edits shared workbooks prepare changes","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/excelblog/new-ways-to-customize-how-copilot-edits-your-workbooks/4527307","title":"New ways to customize how Copilot edits your workbooks | Microsoft Community Hub","content":"## Personalization and workbook rules introduce new ways to set rules for Copilot in Excel. If you’ve ever typed the same formatting and style instructions into your Copilot prompt every single time - don’t merge cells,” “use my header style,” “name the tables this way”- we built two new features for you! These new customization options let you set your rules once and have Copilot follow them automatically. Personalization is now generally available, and workbook rules are rolling out to general availability across Excel for Web, Windows, and Mac. ### **Personalization: your rules that follow you**. Personalization lets you tell Copilot your standing preferences once, and it follows them across every workbook you touch. These rules are stored in the workbook as a sheet with the “.Rules” naming convention, which signals to Copilot that they should be followed for all edits made in the workbook, regardless of the user.","score":0.73138535,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://learn.microsoft.com/en-nz/answers/questions/5664084/does-microsoft-copilot-actual-edit-excel-sheets","title":"Does Microsoft copilot actual edit excel sheets - Microsoft Q&A","content":"Upgrade to Microsoft Edge to take advantage of the latest features, security updates, and technical support. Every time I try and use copilto to do anything it just creates a new file but doesn’t adjust my file. On the copilot chat screen, just below the chat box **there is + sign for add content and next to it is tools symbol,** you need to click on tools, and click on **AGENT MODE** , only then it \\*\\*allows direct edits to the workbook. I had the excel open and Copilot made changes there, is there a way I can get that old file back? Copilot edits the current workbook only when you open the file in a supported Excel app with an active Copilot license and cloud storage enabled. You must open the workbook, select the data, then use Copilot to add formulas, create columns, or format ranges directly in the same file after you review and apply the changes.","score":0.46337196,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/excel/copilot/frequently-asked-questions-about-copilot-in-excel","title":"Frequently asked questions about Copilot in Excel | Microsoft Support","content":"Choose the account you want to sign in with. * Use data from the web and internal sources. Excel for Microsoft 365 Excel for Microsoft 365 for Mac Excel for iPad Excel Web App. ## What is Copilot in Excel? You can use it to get insights, generate formulas, create charts and PivotTables, apply formatting, and make direct changes to your workbook, all by describing what you want to do. For more information, see Get started with Copilot in Excel. Copilot in Excel supports a growing set of capabilities, including editing worksheets, generating and transforming data, highlighting, sorting, and filtering your data, fetching information from the web, and searching your work files to provide context for responses. For more information about capabilities, see Get started with Copilot in Excel. For information about data sources, see Copilot in Excel data sources. If the Copilot button is missing and you think you should have it, verify that you meet the Microsoft 365 Copilot requirements.","score":0.43727133,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.neowin.net/news/microsoft-is-changing-excel-behavior-because-it-was-causing-too-much-confusion-for-users","title":"Microsoft is changing Excel behavior because it was ...","content":"Microsoft is killing off an Excel feature and folding it into other Copilot experiences, but some advanced features still aren't ready.","score":0.38525957,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.reddit.com/r/CopilotPro/comments/1kd2ap6/copilot_is_telling_me_that_it_is_not_able_to_edit","title":"CoPilot is telling me that it is not able to edit an Excel ...","content":"From what i have found out using CoPilot, it can only provide ideas/drafts/options/summaries when using data.
